```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement capacity planning for infrastructure"
---
# Capacity Planning
## Task
Plan infrastructure capacity for growth.
## Requirements
1. Analyze current resource utilization trends. 2. Project growth based on historical data.
3. Identify bottlenecks before they occur. 4. Plan capacity changes in advance.
5. Budget for capacity needs.
## Constraints
- Plan 6 months ahead. Maintain 30% headroom. Review monthly.
## Success Criteria
- Growth projected accurately. Bottlenecks identified early. Capacity meets demand.
```
